fab_section_md:
- He personally rode to claim Rego Draz's body and extracted the killers' names by threat (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:69)
- He ruled the killers unworthy of a clean death (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:73)
- He lost his daughter Daenerys to the Shivers, drank dreamwine, and demanded of Septon Barth why the gods took her (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:101)
- He granted Rogar Baratheon leave and aid to hunt Borys and the Vulture King (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:185)
- He slew Borys with Blackfyre in the mountains (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:201)
- In 62 AC he named Aemon Prince of Dragonstone and launched his road-building project (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:229)

- Pentoshi master of coin, called the Lord of Air; served the Iron Throne ten years and never resided in the Red Keep, keeping a manse on the Street of Silk (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:59)
- Grown stout, he traveled by gilded palanquin, and on a route through Flea Bottom a hungry mob who blamed him for the price of bread swarmed him (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:59)
- His skull was crushed with a cobblestone and his fingers cut off for his rings (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:63)
- He never married but had three bastard sons (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:123)
identity_line: Rego Draz — Pentoshi master of coin, called the Lord of Air; served the Iron Throne ten years and never resided in the Red Keep, keeping a manse on the Street of Silk.

fab_section_md:
- Princess, daughter of Jaehaerys and Alysanne, "the darling of the realm," age six and past weaning. She woke her mother saying she was cold; despite prayers, poultices, a summoned wet nurse and her kitten, she died within a day and a half (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:101)
- Her death struck at the Doctrine of Exceptionalism, for she was Targaryen on both sides (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:103)
identity_line: Daenerys Targaryen — Princess, daughter of Jaehaerys and Alysanne, "the darling of the realm," age six and past weaning. She woke her mother saying she was cold; despite prayers, poultices, a summoned wet nurse and her kitten, she died within a day and a half.

fab_section_md:
- Lord of Storm's End and one-time King's Hand; untouched by the Shivers though his brother Ronnal died and his children by Queen Alyssa recovered. In 61 AC, grey and gaunt, he brought three girls to court and, dying, asked Jaehaerys to take Jocelyn and her cousins as wards (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:165)
- He slew the Vulture King in single combat with his axe (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:205)
- He died at Storm's End half a year later (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:207)
identity_line: Rogar Baratheon — Lord of Storm's End and one-time King's Hand; untouched by the Shivers though his brother Ronnal died and his children by Queen Alyssa recovered. In 61 AC, grey and gaunt, he brought three girls to court and, dying, asked Jaehaerys to take Jocelyn and her cousins as wards.

fab_section_md:
- Fifth child of Jaehaerys and Alysanne, born late 60 AC on Dragonstone and named for the queen's late mother. As a babe she resembled Daenerys but grew long-faced and skinny with mismatched eyes (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:149)
- A wooden sword broke her nose at six, which she did not mind; she took after Baelon, wore boy's clothes, and refused porridge (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:153)
identity_line: Alyssa Targaryen — Fifth child of Jaehaerys and Alysanne, born late 60 AC on Dragonstone and named for the queen's late mother. As a babe she resembled Daenerys but grew long-faced and skinny with mismatched eyes.

fab_section_md:
- Eldest son of Jaehaerys; in 62 AC, aged seven, he was made Prince of Dragonstone and acknowledged heir (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:213)
- Tall and handsome, he trained daily with his brother Baelon (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:215)
- At his investiture feast the queen seated Jocelyn beside him and the two talked and laughed all evening (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:215)
identity_line: Aemon Targaryen — Eldest son of Jaehaerys; in 62 AC, aged seven, he was made Prince of Dragonstone and acknowledged heir.

fab_section_md:
- Ser; brother of Rogar who left the stormlands, spent time in Myr and Volantis, then joined the Vulture King in the Red Mountains and raided his own people (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:173)
- Cornered first, he rushed the king and was slain (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:199)
identity_line: Borys Baratheon — Ser; brother of Rogar who left the stormlands, spent time in Myr and Volantis, then joined the Vulture King in the Red Mountains and raided his own people.

fab_section_md:
- Young Lord of Highgarden, son of the late Bertrand; called young and eager but of doubtful wits, appointed master of coin (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:141)
- His wife Florence Fossoway kept all the accounts of Highgarden (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:135)
identity_line: Martyn Tyrell — Young Lord of Highgarden, son of the late Bertrand; called young and eager but of doubtful wits, appointed master of coin.

fab_section_md: - Lady of House Tyrell by marriage, a Fossoway girl who had been counting apples since she learned to walk and kept Highgarden's accounts, reputedly increasing its incomes by a third (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:135)
identity_line: Florence Fossoway — Lady of House Tyrell by marriage, a Fossoway girl who had been counting apples since she learned to walk and kept Highgarden's accounts, reputedly increasing its incomes by a third.

fab_section_md:
- Rogar's daughter by Queen Alyssa, born in the Year of the Stranger; grown into a tall, solemn girl with large dark eyes and black hair (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:161)
- Brought to court as a ward, she watched Aemon train and was seated beside him at his investiture feast (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:159)
identity_line: Jocelyn Baratheon — Rogar's daughter by Queen Alyssa, born in the Year of the Stranger; grown into a tall, solemn girl with large dark eyes and black hair.

fab_section_md: - Lord of the Tides of Driftmark; recovered after being at the point of death, but lost his second son and three daughters to the Shivers (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:35)
identity_line: Daemon Velaryon — Lord of the Tides of Driftmark; recovered after being at the point of death, but lost his second son and three daughters to the Shivers.

fab_section_md: - Daughter of Jaehaerys and Alysanne born 62 AC; gentle, selfless, sweet-natured and bright, she attached herself to her sister Alyssa (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:219)
identity_line: Maegelle Targaryen — Daughter of Jaehaerys and Alysanne born 62 AC; gentle, selfless, sweet-natured and bright, she attached herself to her sister Alyssa.

fab_section_md: - Survived the Shivers a second time, having earlier returned alive from Alys Westhill's voyage, though his wife and children died; grandson of Donnel the Delayer (fab-the-long-reign-cont-14-p01:45)
